SEARCH
Package jGameLib.math

Class Vec2i

java.lang.Object
jGameLib.math.Vec2i
public final class Vec2i extends Object
A class representing a pair of integer coordinates or size. Vectors can be added to each other, scaled, and multiplied component-wise. Vectors are immutable, which means that they cannot be changed once constructed.

  • Constructor Details

    • Vec2i

      public Vec2i(int x, int y)

    • Vec2i

      public Vec2i(int v)
      Constructs the vector [v, v]

    • Vec2i

      public Vec2i(Dimension d)
      Creates a Vec2i from a Dimension

    • Vec2i

      public Vec2i(Vec2 v)
      Creates a Vec2i from a Vec2.
      Decimal places are truncated.

  • Method Details

    • add

      public static Vec2i add(Vec2i a, Vec2i b)
      Adds two vectors.
      add([x1, y1], [x2, y2]) = [x1 + x2, y1 + y2]

    • sub

      public static Vec2i sub(Vec2i a, Vec2i b)
      Subtracts two vectors.
      sub([x1, y1], [x2, y2]) = [x1 - x2, y1 - y2]

    • scale

      public static Vec2i scale(Vec2i p, int c)
      Scales a vector by a constant c.
      scale([x, y], c) = [c * x, c * y]

    • scale

      public static Vec2i scale(Vec2i p, int sx, int sy)
      Scales each component of a vector by sx and sy, respectively.
      scale([x, y], sx, sy) = [sx * x, sy * y].
      This is a shortcut for component-wise vector multiplication.

    • magnitude

      public static double magnitude(Vec2i p)
      Returns:
      The length of the vector sqrt(x * x + y * y)

    • distance

      public static double distance(Vec2i a, Vec2i b)
      Returns:
      The distance between two vectors, equal to magnitude(sub(a, b))

    • manhattanDistance

      public static int manhattanDistance(Vec2i a, Vec2i b)
      Returns:
      The manhattan distance between two vectors.
      manhattanDistance([x1, y1], [x2, y2]) = abs(x1 - x2) + abs(y1 - y2)

    • toDimension

      public Dimension toDimension()
      Converts this Vec2i into a Dimension

    • x

      public int x()
      Returns:
      The x-component of the vector

    • y

      Returns:
      The y-component of the vector

      public Vec2i transform(Function<Integer,Integer> func)
